summary: Gate coverage misses legacy waiting-for-human compatibility and an autonomous final-prepare current-HEAD race.

findings.detail: Unconditional seven-field descriptor validation converts legacy approval-required and human-judgment-required waiting outcomes into action_failed.
Autonomous final_prepare can rebind a ready artifact from head A to head B because prepared HEAD is not compared after the action.

inspection.summary: Inspected Story through implementation, ran 181 focused tests, directly reproduced legacy waiting-for-human regression, checked sequencing, and confirmed conformance stays at baseline 69.

judgment_delta: Broad matrix initially appeared sufficient -> needs_changes after concrete legacy stop regression and stale-ready HEAD race were demonstrated; architecture boundary concern cleared.
